positive: A symmetrical, vibrant tapestry of stylized celestial fauna and botanical life. The central composition features a gracefully intertwined silhouette of a crescent moon, bioluminescent jellyfish, and mythological winged hummingbirds. The style should be detailed linework combined with flat, contrasting color blocking, reminiscent of Japanese Ukiyo-e meets Art Nouveau etching. Use deep indigo, vibrant teal, copper gold, and crisp white for the color palette. The composition must be designed with a strong central focal point and a clean border suitable for apparel printing, featuring intricate but non-busy patterns and clean silhouettes. High contrast, perfect symmetry, vector illustration quality, intricate pattern repeating.
negative: text, words, letters, logo, watermark, signature, border frame, blurry, noise, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, cropped, grain, monochrome, messy
